en: Which should you use and when The meaning is totally different If I say I have a few
ko: 언제 어떤 걸 써야 할까? 의미가 완전히 달라 내가 I have a few라고 하면

en: this is quite positive It means I have some friends it's enough If I say I have few
ko: 이건 꽤 긍정적이야 친구가 좀 있다는 뜻이고 충분하다는 거야 만약 I have few라고 하면

en: friends this means I don't have many friends It's a more negative meaning Find
ko: friends 이건 친구가 별로 없다는 뜻이야 더 부정적인 의미지
